summary: auth set-token now accepts/persists all three Bento credentials (publishable key + secret key + site UUID) as positional args; SaveCredential signature widened from (token) to (pk, sk, siteUuid); auth setup + auth status prose corrected.
reason: Greptile P1: SaveCredential() wrote only BentoPublishableKey, but AuthHeader() requires BOTH pk AND sk (Bento Basic auth) plus site_uuid on every request. Single-arg set-token left users with 401s the moment env vars were unset.
